verdicts.description: Confirm the incoming unit is verified at state 13 (cover strip) before any work begins; do not disturb the front end.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Incoming vehicle confirmed at state 13 against the cover strip before the upgrade is started.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker checks the incoming unit against the state-13 cover strip and confirms the configuration at 00:00:25 before starting.

verdicts.description: Remove the rear wheel assembly: unscrew both rear acorn nuts by hand; remove nuts, washers, wheels and pulley into the segregated reuse tray.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: All rear wheel hardware (2 nuts, 2 washers, 2 wheels, 1 pulley) removed by hand into the segregated reuse tray.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker removes both rear acorn nuts, washers, wheels and the pulley by hand into the reuse tray at 00:01:10; count-back of 2/2/2/1 is performed.

verdicts.description: Remove both rear chassis pins: withdraw the front-rear and rear-rear pins straight out into the reuse tray without levering against the bores.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Both rear pins withdrawn axially into the reuse tray; bores clear and undamaged.
verdicts.reasoning: Both rear pins withdrawn straight out into the reuse tray at 00:01:50; no levering against the printed bores observed.

verdicts.description: Remove the long rear chassis: lift the long-brace rear chassis from the base and tag it 'removed - long configuration'; do not place it in the reuse tray.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Long-brace rear chassis lifted off, tagged 'removed - long configuration', and routed away from the reuse tray (state 18).
verdicts.reasoning: Worker lifts the long braces clear, tags them and routes them separately from the reuse tray at 00:02:30; front end left undisturbed.

verdicts.description: Install the short rear chassis: compare one brace against a removed long brace, then align and fit the short braces to the rear interface.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Short braces verified shorter than the removed long brace and fitted parallel with bores concentric.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker compares a new brace against a removed long brace, confirms it is shorter, and fits the short braces parallel with bores concentric at 00:03:20.

verdicts.description: Reinstall both rear chassis pins from the reuse tray, each to a full seat with correct orientation.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Both reused pins inserted to a full seat with correct type and orientation; chassis secure with no play.
verdicts.reasoning: Both pins reinstalled from the reuse tray to a full seat with correct orientation at 00:04:05; rear chassis shows no play.

verdicts.description: Reinstall the rear wheel assembly from the reuse tray: install the pulley first, then wheel, washer and acorn nut on each side; tighten to firm finger torque.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Rear pulley reinstalled first, then both rear stacks reassembled with washer present and acorn nuts at firm finger torque; wheels rotate freely.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker reinstalls the pulley first, then both rear stacks with washers present and acorn nuts finger-tightened at 00:05:00; both wheels rotate freely.

verdicts.description: Confirm the reuse tray is empty; any remaining item indicates hardware missing from the vehicle.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Reuse tray confirmed empty after reinstallation, indicating all removed hardware was refitted to the vehicle.
verdicts.reasoning: One magenta washer remains in the reuse tray at the end of reinstallation. A non-empty reuse tray indicates hardware missing from the vehicle (a wheel washer was not refitted), which is the documented low-detectability washer-omission error.
